title: Glassy Slovakian Mushroom Pasta
description: A silky, low‑calorie pasta dish infused with umami mushrooms and a creamy, glassy sauce that captures a taste of Slovakia.
instructions: Cook the spaghetti in salted boiling water according to package directions until al dente, then drain and set aside.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat and sauté the diced onion until translucent.
Add the sliced mushrooms to the skillet and cook until they release their moisture and start browning.
Stir in the minced garlic and cook for an additional 30 seconds until fragrant.
Sprinkle the flour over the mushrooms and stir well to coat, cooking for 1 minute to remove the raw taste.
Gradually pour in the vegetable stock, whisking constantly to avoid lumps and bring the mixture to a gentle simmer.
Reduce the heat to low, then fold in the Greek yogurt and grated parmesan until the sauce thickens into a glossy, smooth consistency.
Season the sauce with salt and pepper, tasting and adjusting as needed.
Toss the cooked spaghetti into the skillet, ensuring each strand is coated with the silky mushroom sauce.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley before serving.
